validation.email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.password: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
validation.passwordLowercase: Passwords must have at least one lowercase ('a'-'z').
validation.passwordUppercase: Passwords must have at least one uppercase ('A'-'Z').
validation.passwordNonAlphanumeric: Passwords must have at least one non alphanumeric character.
validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 3 characters long.
validation.surnameMin: Surname must be at least 3 characters long.
validation.usernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters long.

verifyEmail.title: Email Verification
verifyEmail.successMessage: Your email address has been successfully verified. You can now log in.
verifyEmail.errorMessage: The verification token is invalid or expired. Please try again by requesting a new verification link.
verifyEmail.resendDescription: If you haven't received the verification email, you can request a new verification link to be sent to your email address.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Your Password?
forgotPassword.description: Please enter your email address. We will send you a password reset link.
forgotPassword.description2: We will send the reset link to this email address.
forgotPassword.successMessage: Password reset link has been sent to your email address. Please check your inbox and follow the instructions to reset your password.
forgotPassword.errorMessage: An error occurred while sending the reset link. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset Your Password
resetPassword.description: Please set a new password for your account.
resetPassword.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
resetPassword.passwordCase: Password must contain at least one uppercase and one lowercase letter.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now log in.
resetPassword.errorMessage: The password reset token is invalid or expired. Please try again by requesting a new reset link.

accountNotVerified.title: Account Not Verified
accountNotVerified.description: Please verify your email address to gain full access to your account. You cannot use your account until the verification process is complete.
accountNotVerified.description2: Can't find the email? Don't forget to check your Spam/Junk folder.
accountNotVerified.successMessage: Verification link resent successfully. Please check your inbox.
accountNotVerified.errorMessage: An error occurred while resending the verification link. Please try again.
accountNotVerified.rateLimitMessage: You have requested too many verification links. Please wait a while before trying again.
